sql_array: START TRANSACTION; SAVEPOINT sp1; CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(100)); ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT sp1;
START TRANSACTION; SAVEPOINT sp2; INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name'); RELEASE SAVEPOINT sp2;
START TRANSACTION; SAVEPOINT sp3; UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = 1; ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT sp3;
START TRANSACTION; SAVEPOINT sp4; SELECT * FROM test_table; RELEASE SAVEPOINT sp4;
START TRANSACTION; SAVEPOINT sp5; DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id = 1; ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT sp5;
